creator: christophe.cap@gdnmail.net
text:
I upgraded X.org 6.9 to xorg 7.2 folowing the UPDATE scenario.

After more or less of 36 hours of compiling and finaly rebooting 

X does not start and exits with error :

xf86OpenConsole KDSETMODE KD_GRAPHICS failed.

NOTE that I tried folowing things already :

- use both a new xorg.conf and the original one 
- tried with standard vga driver, nv driver and nvidia driver
- replaced kdm with xdm and back (and increased the warning level)
- rebuild & reinstall ports/x11/xorg (the meta port) 

All attemts above report the same error.

NOTE: I've got a tar with logs available... where should I send it ???

How-To-Repeat: startx or reboot....
